Colormap for Pebble Time watches, custom exceptions, and GIF to APNG conversion functionality.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Empty file (no analyzable contents).
- **[colormap.txt](colormap.txt.md)**: Colormap for Pebble Time watches in a format compatible with gifsicle's --user-colormap flag.
- **[exceptions.py](exceptions.py.md)**: Defines custom exceptions for errors in GIF to APNG conversion.
- **[gif.py](gif.py.md)**: Converts GIF images to APNG format using temporary files and subprocess calls.
